con:part.con:content: <definitions targetNamespace="http://example.com/namesservice" name="NamesService" xmlns="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:tns="http://example.com/namesservice" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/"> <!--================== TYPES ==================--> <types> <xs:schema targetNamespace="http://example.com/namesservice" elementFormDefault="qualified"> <!--Request--> <xs:element name="GetNamesRequest"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="header"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="action" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="request"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="header"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="user" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="dateTime" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="application" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="filter"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="includeNames" type="xs:boolean"/> <xs:element name="includeTrees" type="xs:boolean"/> <xs:element name="includeRoads" type="xs:boolean"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <!--Response--> <xs:element name="GetNamesResponse"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="Names"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="Category" maxOccurs="unbounded"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="CategoryName" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="Name" type="xs:string" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:schema> </types> <!--================== MESSAGES ==================--> <message name="GetNamesRequestMessage"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:GetNamesRequest"/> </message> <message name="GetNamesResponseMessage"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:GetNamesResponse"/> </message> <!--================== PORT TYPE ==================--> <portType name="NamesServicePortType"> <operation name="GetNames"> <input message="tns:GetNamesRequestMessage"/> <output message="tns:GetNamesResponseMessage"/> </operation> </portType> <!--================== BINDING ==================--> <binding name="NamesServiceBinding" type="tns:NamesServicePortType"> <soap:binding style="document" transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"/> <operation name="GetNames"> <soap:operation soapAction="http://example.com/namesservice/GetNames"/> <input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </output> </operation> </binding> <!--================== SERVICE ==================--> <service name="NamesService"> <port name="NamesServicePort" binding="tns:NamesServiceBinding"> <soap:address location="http://localhost:8080/NamesService"/> </port> </service> </definitions>

<definitions targetNamespace="http://example.com/aservice" name="NamesService" xmlns="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:tns="http://example.com/aservice" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/"> <!--================== TYPES ==================--> <types> <xs:schema targetNamespace="http://example.com/aservice" elementFormDefault="qualified"> <!--Request--> <xs:element name="GetARequest"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="header"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="requestor" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="requestDateTime" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="callingContext" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="request"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="filter"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="includeNames" type="xs:boolean"/> <xs:element name="includeTrees" type="xs:boolean"/> <xs:element name="includeRoads" type="xs:boolean"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <!--Response--> <xs:element name="GetAResponse"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="header"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="requestor" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="requestDateTime" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="callingContext" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="Names"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="Category" maxOccurs="unbounded"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="CategoryName" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="Name" type="xs:string" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:schema> </types> <!--================== MESSAGES ==================--> <message name="GetARequestMessage"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:GetARequest"/> </message> <message name="GetAResponseMessage"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:GetAResponse"/> </message> <!--================== PORT TYPE ==================--> <portType name="AServicePortType"> <operation name="GetNames"> <input message="tns:GetARequestMessage"/> <output message="tns:GetAResponseMessage"/> </operation> </portType> <!--================== BINDING ==================--> <binding name="AServiceBinding" type="tns:AServicePortType"> <soap:binding style="document" transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"/> <operation name="GetNames"> <soap:operation soapAction="http://example.com/aservice/GetNames"/> <input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </output> </operation> </binding> <!--================== SERVICE ==================--> <service name="AService"> <port name="AServicePort" binding="tns:AServiceBinding"> <soap:address location="http://localhost:7800/AService"/> </port> </service> </definitions>

<definitions targetNamespace="http://example.com/bservice" name="NamesService" xmlns="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:tns="http://example.com/bservice" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/"> <!--================== TYPES ==================--> <types> <xs:schema targetNamespace="http://example.com/bservice" elementFormDefault="qualified"> <!--Request--> <xs:element name="GetBRequest"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="request"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="header"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="requestor" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="requestDateTime" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="callingContext" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="filter"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="includeNames" type="xs:boolean"/> <xs:element name="includeTrees" type="xs:boolean"/> <xs:element name="includeRoads" type="xs:boolean"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <!--Response--> <xs:element name="GetBResponse"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="header"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="requestor" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="requestDateTime" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="callingContext" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="Names"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="Category" maxOccurs="unbounded"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="CategoryName" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="Name" type="xs:string" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:schema> </types> <!--================== MESSAGES ==================--> <message name="GetBRequestMessage"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:GetBRequest"/> </message> <message name="GetBResponseMessage"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:GetBResponse"/> </message> <!--================== PORT TYPE ==================--> <portType name="BServicePortType"> <operation name="GetNames"> <input message="tns:GetBRequestMessage"/> <output message="tns:GetBResponseMessage"/> </operation> </portType> <!--================== BINDING ==================--> <binding name="BServiceBinding" type="tns:BServicePortType"> <soap:binding style="document" transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"/> <operation name="GetNames"> <soap:operation soapAction="http://example.com/bservice/GetNames"/> <input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </output> </operation> </binding> <!--================== SERVICE ==================--> <service name="BService"> <port name="BServicePort" binding="tns:BServiceBinding"> <soap:address location="http://localhost:7800/BService"/> </port> </service> </definitions>

<definitions targetNamespace="http://example.com/dservice" name="NamesService" xmlns="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:tns="http://example.com/dservice" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/"> <!--================== TYPES ==================--> <types> <xs:schema targetNamespace="http://example.com/dservice" elementFormDefault="qualified"> <!--Request--> <xs:element name="GetDRequest"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="request"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="header"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="requestor" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="requestDateTime" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="callingContext" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="filter"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="includeNames" type="xs:boolean"/> <xs:element name="includeTrees" type="xs:boolean"/> <xs:element name="includeRoads" type="xs:boolean"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <!--Response--> <xs:element name="GetDResponse"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="header"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="requestor" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="requestDateTime" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="callingContext" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="Names"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="Category" maxOccurs="unbounded"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="CategoryName" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="Name" type="xs:string" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:schema> </types> <!--================== MESSAGES ==================--> <message name="GetDRequestMessage"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:GetDRequest"/> </message> <message name="GetDResponseMessage"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:GetDResponse"/> </message> <!--================== PORT TYPE ==================--> <portType name="DServicePortType"> <operation name="GetNames"> <input message="tns:GetDRequestMessage"/> <output message="tns:GetDResponseMessage"/> </operation> </portType> <!--================== BINDING ==================--> <binding name="DServiceBinding" type="tns:DServicePortType"> <soap:binding style="document" transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"/> <operation name="GetNames"> <soap:operation soapAction="http://example.com/dservice/GetNames"/> <input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </output> </operation> </binding> <!--================== SERVICE ==================--> <service name="DService"> <port name="DServicePort" binding="tns:DServiceBinding"> <soap:address location="http://localhost:7800/DService"/> </port> </service> </definitions>

<definitions targetNamespace="http://example.com/cservice" name="NamesService" xmlns="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:tns="http://example.com/cservice" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/"> <!--================== TYPES ==================--> <types> <xs:schema targetNamespace="http://example.com/cservice" elementFormDefault="qualified"> <!--Request--> <xs:element name="GetCRequest"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="request"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="header"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="requestor" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="requestDateTime" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="callingContext" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="filter"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="includeNames" type="xs:boolean"/> <xs:element name="includeTrees" type="xs:boolean"/> <xs:element name="includeRoads" type="xs:boolean"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <!--Response--> <xs:element name="GetCResponse"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="header"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="requestor" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="requestDateTime" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="callingContext" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="Names"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="Category" maxOccurs="unbounded"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="CategoryName" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="Name" type="xs:string" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:schema> </types> <!--================== MESSAGES ==================--> <message name="GetCRequestMessage"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:GetCRequest"/> </message> <message name="GetCResponseMessage"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:GetCResponse"/> </message> <!--================== PORT TYPE ==================--> <portType name="CServicePortType"> <operation name="GetNames"> <input message="tns:GetCRequestMessage"/> <output message="tns:GetCResponseMessage"/> </operation> </portType> <!--================== BINDING ==================--> <binding name="CServiceBinding" type="tns:CServicePortType"> <soap:binding style="document" transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"/> <operation name="GetNames"> <soap:operation soapAction="http://example.com/cservice/GetNames"/> <input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </output> </operation> </binding> <!--================== SERVICE ==================--> <service name="CService"> <port name="CServicePort" binding="tns:CServiceBinding"> <soap:address location="http://localhost:7800/CService"/> </port> </service> </definitions>
